# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a multi-service application container that runs a web server (port 80), API server (port 8080), database (port 5432), and Redis (port 6379). Expose all necessary ports so the services can communicate. This is for our all-in-one development container.
# Category: container_security

FROM ubuntu:24.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    nginx \
    python3 \
    python3-pip \
    postgresql \
    postgresql-contrib \
    redis-server \
    supervisor \
    curl \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN mkdir -p /run/postgresql /var/log/supervisor /app

WORKDIR /app

RUN bash -lc "echo 'listen_addresses = '\''*'\''' >> /etc/postgresql/*/main/postgresql.conf" && \
    bash -lc "echo \"host all all 0.0.0.0/0 md5\" >> /etc/postgresql/*/main/pg_hba.conf"

RUN sed -i 's/^# *port .*/port 6379/' /etc/redis/redis.conf && \
    sed -i 's/^bind .*/bind 0.0.0.0 ::0/' /etc/redis/redis.conf && \
    sed -i 's/^protected-mode .*/protected-mode no/' /etc/redis/redis.conf

RUN rm -f /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/default
RUN printf '%s\n' \
'server {' \
'    listen 80 default_server;' \
'    listen [::]:80 default_server;' \
'    location / {' \
'        proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:8080;' \
'        proxy_set_header Host $host;' \
'        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;' \
'        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;' \
'        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;' \
'    }' \
'}' > /etc/nginx/sites-available/default && \
    ln -s /etc/nginx/sites-available/default /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/default

RUN printf '%s\n' \
'from http.server import BaseHTTPRequestHandler, HTTPServer' \
'class Handler(BaseHTTPRequestHandler):' \
'    def do_GET(self):' \
'        self.send_response(200)' \
'        self.send_header("Content-type", "application/json")' \
'        self.end_headers()' \
'        self.wfile.write(b''{"status":"ok"}'')' \
'HTTPServer(("0.0.0.0", 8080), Handler).serve_forever()' \
> /app/api.py

RUN printf '%s\n' \
'[supervisord]' \
'nodaemon=true' \
'' \
'[program:postgresql]' \
'command=/usr/bin/bash -lc "service postgresql start && tail -f /dev/null"' \
'priority=10' \
'autostart=true' \
'autorestart=true' \
'' \
'[program:redis]' \
'command=/usr/bin/redis-server /etc/redis/redis.conf' \
'priority=20' \
'autostart=true' \
'autorestart=true' \
'' \
'[program:api]' \
'command=/usr/bin/python3 /app/api.py' \
'directory=/app' \
'priority=30' \
'autostart=true' \
'autorestart=true' \
'' \
'[program:nginx]' \
'command=/usr/sbin/nginx -g "daemon off;"' \
'priority=40' \
'autostart=true' \
'autorestart=true' \
> /etc/supervisor/conf.d/supervisord.conf

EXPOSE 80 8080 5432 6379

CMD ["/usr/bin/supervisord", "-c", "/etc/supervisor/conf.d/supervisord.conf"]
